critical.title: CRITICAL RISK ZONE
critical.description: Your lack of clarity is costing you BRUTALLY. Every day without vision is a day of wasted resources and lost opportunities.
critical.recommendation: URGENT: You need to create your vision NOW. The cost of continuing like this is unsustainable.

wasted.title: WASTED POTENTIAL ZONE
wasted.description: You have SOMETHING, but it's not enough. You're leaving massive value on the table. Your team isn't aligned. Resources are scattered.
wasted.recommendation: You need to clarify and strengthen your vision. You have the foundation, but you need PRECISION.

clarity.title: You Have SIGNIFICANT CLARITY
clarity.description: You're better than 80% of entrepreneurs. But there's still room to MULTIPLY your impact. Small improvements in clarity = MASSIVE improvements in results.
clarity.recommendation: Refine your vision to reach the level of transformative companies. You're close to the next level.
